name: Barbecued Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the garlic as for Roasted Garlic.
2. Place whole heads of garlic on a sheet of heavy-duty foil.
3. Top each head with 1/4 cup (4 tbsp) butter and one sprig of fresh rosemary or oregano.
4. If fresh herbs are unavailable, substitute 2 teaspoons dried herbs for the fresh ones.
5. Fold the foil over the garlic to seal the package well.
6. Cook over hot coals for about 45 minutes, turning the package occasionally with tongs.
